item.title: Master LLM Function Calling with n8n: Build an AI-Powered Data Lookup Agent using Google Gemini 1.5 Pro | إتقان استدعاء وظائف نماذج اللغة الكبيرة (LLM) باستخدام n8n: بناء وكيل بحث بيانات مدعوم بالذكاء الاصطناعي باستخدام Google Gemini 1.5 Pro
item.description: Unlock the true potential of AI automation by mastering LLM function calling within n8n. This guide shows you how to build an intelligent data lookup agent using Google Gemini 1.5 Pro to interact with external systems and provide dynamic, accurate answers.

item.title: Automate LinkedIn Engagement: Build a Python Playwright Bot for Likes & Comments | أتمتة تفاعل LinkedIn: بناء بوت Python Playwright للإعجابات والتعليقات
item.description: Learn to build a powerful Python bot using Playwright to automate LinkedIn post likes and comments. This guide provides step-by-step instructions to boost your professional network's visibility and engagement efficiently.

item.title: Master Automated Code Review with DeepSeek V3 & n8n (Full Workflow Guide) | إتقان مراجعة الكود الآلية باستخدام DeepSeek V3 و n8n (دليل سير العمل الكامل)
item.description: Learn to build a powerful n8n workflow that leverages DeepSeek V3 to perform automated code reviews, providing instant feedback and refactoring suggestions. Streamline your development process and enhance code quality effortlessly.

item.title: Master Automated Social Media Content Generation with n8n & Google Gemini 1.5 Flash | إتقان إنشاء محتوى وسائل التواصل الاجتماعي الآلي باستخدام n8n و Google Gemini 1.5 Flash
item.description: This guide teaches you how to build a powerful n8n workflow to automatically generate diverse social media posts using Google Gemini 1.5 Flash, saving you countless hours of manual content creation. Learn to engineer prompts, process AI outputs, and prepare content for seamless multi-platform scheduling.

item.title: Automate Educational Video Creation: Python, MoviePy & LLM-Generated Scripts | أتمتة إنشاء مقاطع الفيديو التعليمية: بايثون، MoviePy، وسكريبتات من نماذج اللغة الكبيرة (LLM)
item.description: Learn how to build an automated pipeline to generate educational videos programmatically using Python, MoviePy, and AI-generated scripts. This guide empowers developers and creators to scale content production efficiently.

item.title: Master Dynamic Web Scraping: Python & Playwright for Complex Data Extraction | إتقان استخراج البيانات الديناميكية من الويب: بايثون وبلاي رايت لاستخلاص البيانات المعقدة
item.description: Learn to build powerful web scrapers using Python and Playwright, mastering techniques to navigate dynamic websites, handle JavaScript-rendered content, and extract complex data efficiently. This guide provides a step-by-step tutorial for robust automation.

item.title: Master Self-Hosted n8n with Docker Compose for Secure AI Workflows (Claude 3.5 Sonnet Example) | إتقان استضافة n8n ذاتيًا باستخدام Docker Compose لسير عمل الذكاء الاصطناعي الآمن (مثال Claude 3.5 Sonnet)
item.description: This guide provides a step-by-step tutorial on deploying a secure, self-hosted n8n instance using Docker Compose on a Virtual Private Server (VPS), and then integrating it with Claude 3.5 Sonnet for advanced AI-powered content generation workflows.

item.title: Build a Multi-Agent Competitive Intelligence System with Python & DeepSeek V3 | بناء نظام ذكاء تنافسي متعدد الوكلاء باستخدام بايثون و DeepSeek V3
item.description: Learn how to design and build a sophisticated multi-agent system in Python, leveraging DeepSeek V3 for automated competitive analysis and strategic insights. This guide provides a step-by-step tutorial for creating specialized agents that collaborate to research, analyze, and report on market trends.

item.title: Master Programmatic Video Ad Generation with FFmpeg & Node.js | إتقان إنشاء إعلانات الفيديو البرمجية باستخدام FFmpeg و Node.js
item.description: Learn to build a powerful Node.js pipeline to programmatically generate dynamic video ads using FFmpeg. This guide covers stitching clips, adding text overlays, and integrating data for scalable video creation.

item.title: Automate Research Digest Creation with n8n & Google Gemini 1.5 Pro (Full Guide + Code) | أتمتة إنشاء ملخصات الأبحاث باستخدام n8n و Google Gemini 1.5 Pro (دليل كامل + كود)
item.description: Learn to build a powerful n8n workflow that leverages Google Gemini 1.5 Pro's advanced capabilities to automatically summarize complex documents and extract key insights for research digests. This guide provides step-by-step instructions and practical code to streamline your information processing.

item.title: Master Local LLMs with n8n: Build Privacy-Focused AI Workflows (Ollama Integration Guide) | إتقان النماذج اللغوية المحلية (LLMs) باستخدام n8n: بناء سير عمل ذكاء اصطناعي يركز على الخصوصية (دليل تكامل Ollama)
item.description: Learn to integrate local Large Language Models (LLMs) via Ollama with n8n, enabling powerful, privacy-focused AI automation without reliance on external cloud services. This guide provides step-by-step instructions to set up Ollama and connect it to n8n for custom AI workflows.

item.title: Automate Dynamic Data Visualization Videos with Node.js & Remotion | أتمتة مقاطع فيديو تصور البيانات الديناميكية باستخدام Node.js و Remotion
item.description: Learn to build a powerful pipeline for programmatically generating animated data visualization videos at scale using Node.js and Remotion. This guide will walk you through setting up your project, integrating data, and rendering dynamic video content for reports and dashboards.

item.title: Automate YouTube Shorts Production: AI Scripting & Programmatic Video Generation with Node.js | أتمتة إنتاج فيديوهات YouTube القصيرة: كتابة النصوص بالذكاء الاصطناعي وإنشاء الفيديو برمجيًا باستخدام Node.js
item.description: Unlock the power of AI and Node.js to autonomously generate engaging YouTube Shorts. This guide walks you through scripting, voiceovers, and video assembly, transforming your content creation pipeline.

item.title: Build a Real-time AI Content Moderation System with n8n & DeepSeek V3 | بناء نظام ذكاء اصطناعي لمراقبة المحتوى في الوقت الفعلي باستخدام n8n و DeepSeek V3
item.description: Learn how to architect and implement a robust, real-time AI content moderation pipeline using n8n and DeepSeek V3, ensuring your platform remains safe and compliant. This guide provides a step-by-step tutorial for automatically classifying and flagging inappropriate content.

item.title: Master Real-time Data Enrichment: Build Dynamic Workflows with n8n & Perplexity AI | إتقان إثراء البيانات في الوقت الفعلي: بناء سير عمل ديناميكي باستخدام n8n وPerplexity AI
item.description: Learn how to leverage n8n webhooks and the Perplexity AI API to create automated workflows that enrich data and make dynamic decisions in real-time. This guide empowers you to build smarter, event-driven automation pipelines.
